summary:
📋 Weekly Review Digest

Issues Found
- None this week. Bug-Hunter checked all four sources; crypto bot is healthy (signals evaluated, all valid HOLDs), and nothing else met the filing bar.

Top Enhancement Ideas (ranked)
1. CRYPTO — Exclude capital injections from Sharpe/returns (effort: low, impact: high): equity step-jumps (10k→29k→49k) are deposits, not gains, inflating Sharpe to a nonsensical 13.29 — fixing this stops false confidence in performance.
2. OVERSEER — Add run miss-detection / dead-man's switch (effort: low, impact: high): it only runs weekly with no alert if a run silently fails to fire.
3. VOLLEYBALL — Alert when no footage ingested (effort: low, impact: medium): pipeline self-test is green but it has never ingested footage, so the empty dashboard hides the real gap.
4. UFC — Denoise line-movement scraping (effort: medium, impact: low): data is healthy and rich, just some noise to clean up.

coachvision.reason: read OK but no recent activity / stale data
